detail.description: Alika Williams doubles (9) on a ground ball to left fielder Daylen Lile.
Alika Williams doubles (8) on a line drive to right fielder Dylan Crews.
Alika Williams doubles (7) on a line drive to center fielder Jakob Marsee.
Alika Williams homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field.
Alika Williams doubles (5) on a line drive to left fielder Bryan Reynolds.
Alika Williams singles on a soft line drive to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Jeff McNeil to 2nd.
Alika Williams doubles (6) on a line drive to left fielder Victor Bericoto. Jeff McNeil scores.
Alika Williams singles on a line drive to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Lawrence Butler scores.
Alika Williams singles on a ground ball to left fielder Brice Matthews.
Alika Williams singles on a ground ball to left fielder Gavin Sheets. Henry Bolte scores.
Alika Williams singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. Zack Gelof scores.
